title: Contact | Julian Smith MP
meta_description: Latest news and campaigns from Julian Smith, Member of Parliament for Skipton and Ripon.
headings: h3: Julian Smith MP Member of Parliament for Skipton and Ripon
text_excerpt: Contact | Julian Smith MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Julian News Julian's Priorities Parliament Contact Contact Leave this field blank Constituency Office 01756 795898 [email protected] Westminster Office House of Commons, Westminster, SW1A 0AA 0207 219 7145 [email protected] Facebook Twitter Instagram For general enquiries please fill in the form below and Julian or a member of his team will endeavour to respond to you as soon as practically possible. MPs are currently receiving a high level of correspondence therefore response times may be slightly longer than usual. Due to parliamentary conventions, MPs can only reply to correspondence which includes an address. This is to ensure that only constituent casework is taken up. Please direct all postal correspondence to the House of Commons. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy. Contact What can an MP do?
